title: The Future of Potions?
description:
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.

The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?

options.title: Insert [rarity] Potion
options.description: Lose [gold][your potion][/gold]. Obtain an [gold]Upgraded[/gold] [gold][matching rarity] [random type][/gold].

conditions: All players must have at least 2 potions
notes:
One option appears for each of your first [gold]3[/gold] potions (up to 3 total). Selecting a potion sacrifices it and presents a choice of [gold]3 Upgraded[/gold] cards drawn from your character's card pool.

[gold]Potion rarity → Card rarity:[/gold] Rare or Event potion → [gold]Rare[/gold] card; Uncommon potion → [blue]Uncommon[/blue] card; Common or Token potion → Common card.

[gold]Card type[/gold] is randomly selected at the start of the event. Common and Token potions choose from Attack or Skill only; all other rarities can also produce Power cards.

You cannot remove potions during this event.
